    "System successfully evacuated below 500 microns at isolation (435 microns)",
    "Standing decay test at 10 minutes stabilized at 539 microns",
    "Decay rate is low (104 microns total rise over 10 minutes) and remains well below the standard 1000 micron limit, indicating a dry, leak-free system"

    "Proceed with charging the refrigeration system with refrigerant"

  "rationale": "The system was pulled down to 435 microns. After isolating the pump for 10 minutes, the pressure rose slightly to 539 microns and stabilized. A rise of only 104 microns that stays near 500 microns and well below 1000 microns indicates a tight, dry system with no leaks or moisture issues.",
